category_sources: source_facts.description says portable Git/GitHub/GitLab/Forgejo/Bugzilla CLI tool; official homepage says GCLI interacts with Git forges via a command line interface.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gcli; official homepage title is GCLI - A Git Forge CLI.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to the official tutorial; tutorial describes getting started with gcli.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/herrhotzenplotz/gcli; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage lists GitLab, Gitea, GitHub, issues, pull/merge requests, CI, and pipelines.
